name: Iron Accord
summary: Roazian coalition of military architects and engineers responsible for fortifications, strategic facilities, and antimagic infrastructure.
motive: Keep Roaz defensible, logistically efficient, and superior in managing physical and arcane threats.
power_relations: Backed by House Roaz and coordinated with ORE and magical specialists
visible_membership_base: Military architects, masons, engineers, surveyors, controlled enchanters.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: High secrecy around antimagic work generates fear, rumor, and political suspicion even when the work is useful.
